Content: Initalisation of this Repo, adding a ProjectPlan.md with all required Goals and specifications
Design v1 of mechanical shuffling linkage in OnShape, resolving complex mate connectivity challenges without documentation
Drafted electronic architecture defining Seeed Studio XIAO MCU, N20 brushed drive, and BLDC weapon integration
Created electronics.md documentation and placed order for all electrical components, including safety circuitry (Z-diode/capacitors)
Designed v2 of shuffling mechanism from scratch in OnShape and started 3D print for physical validation
Designed and printed shuffling prototype v3.0. identified 0.3mm tolerance sweet-spot and discovered dead-center flipping issues requiring synchronized gearing
Developed v3.1 using DFM principles. merged gears and eccentric cams into monolithic parts using Spur Gear FeatureScript and optimized sliced walls for shear resistance
Assembled and stress-tested prototype v3.2. identified housing deflection and weight issues (53g). tested N20 motors and mapped out upcoming weapon system integration timeline
Installed hardened nozzle on Bambu Lab P1S and performed initial electronics testing by driving the new brushless motors via ESP32 microcontroller
Developed a weaponblade and centered it's mass. Went over 3 iterations and tested each on my new BLDC motor
All remaining electronics arrived, i weighted them as a whole (98g). I continues with v4 of the shuffelingmechanism, which turned out to be only 12g
I remade the shuffelingmechanism, to v5, because i made the previous file unclean
Made a concept of the strucure of the combat robot
Began with the electronics part of the chasis, using the top-down principle
Developed a screwswitch within two iterations that weights 2g. Tried optimizing its safety in the second iteration
Built the whole Chasis of the robot, v1 is done
Programmed the first bit of code, used for the steering, i also printed the Bot and assembled it
Made first part (electronic-part + shuffling)  of the second iteration of the whole Chasis, because i found issues with v1
Began with the mount of the Weapon. Almost done, have to do some finishing touches until v1.1 is done
Finished second iteration of the bot and printed it
Made a programm with failsave to steer the robot
Tried to assemble the robot, had to do some corrections and began soldering
Made a wiring diagram, soldered most electronics, robot can walk!
Improoved grip of the shuffler and removed minor problems in the Chasis
